ham.subject: Subscription Renewal Notice for CloudSuite – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Rajesh,

Hope you are doing well. I am writing to remind you that your subscription for CloudSuite will expire on 15th May 2026. To continue enjoying uninterrupted access to the dashboard, API, and premium support, please renew your plan at the earliest.

You can review your current plan and make the payment by clicking the link below:
<URL>

If you face any issues or have questions about the renewal process, feel free to reply to this email or call our support line at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for choosing CloudSuite. We appreciate your continued partnership.

Best regards,

Sofia Patel
Account Manager, CloudSuite

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Pending – Verify Your Details Now
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

I am writing on behalf of the Income Tax Department. Our records indicate that you are eligible for a tax refund of ₹1,25,000 for the financial year 2024-25. However, we could not process the refund because the bank details on file are incomplete.

To ensure you receive the refund without delay, please verify your bank account details by clicking the link below:
<URL>

Failure to provide the correct details within 7 days may result in a penalty and delay of the refund. Please act immediately to avoid any inconvenience.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,

Anita Shah
Senior Officer
Income Tax Department
